Postnatal
Wellness

Recovery & Restoration · Door-to-Door · Hong Kong

Traditional treatments from Malaysia and Indonesia — time-honoured practices for postpartum healing, brought directly to your home. Because recovery deserves the same devotion as pregnancy.

View Treatments Book a Session
Traditional Malay · Door-to-Door · 10 Days

Bengkung ForMom

An ancient Malay tradition of wrapping the postpartum abdomen with high-quality cotton cloth — creating gentle, even compression to support healing, restore posture, and strengthen the core. Delivered to your home for 10 consecutive days.

Basic · 60 mins / day

Bengkung ForMom Basic

10 days · Home service

HK$8,800 / 10 days

  • 60 minutes per daily session

Bengkung ForMom Plus — Add-On Days

Need more time? Add extra sessions beyond your 10-day plan at the same daily rate as your chosen package.

Traditional Indonesian · Door-to-Door · approx. 60 mins

Jamu ForMom

Rooted in centuries of Javanese herbal wisdom, the Jamu postnatal treatment combines traditional herbal compresses, massage, and body wrapping to support deep postpartum recovery. A holistic ritual to restore warmth, balance, and vitality from the inside out.

Good to Know

Booking & Payment

Everything you need before your first session.

Deposit

A deposit of HK$1,000 is required. Non-refundable and non-transferable.

Payment Schedule

Balance: 50% at 1st session and 50% at 5th session.

Transportation

Home visits across HK. Transport fee HK$50–150+ for remote areas.

Massage Bed

A massage bed (185cm × 75cm) can be arranged. Delivery fee separate.

Postnatal Session
